description_long: This is a modern four-door police car with a robust, streamlined body painted primarily in a light gray or white color. The vehicle features a prominent black push bumper on the front, and a blue emergency light bar mounted centrally on the roof. The windows are tinted, and the wheels are solid black, giving the car a tactical appearance. The rear of the car displays a wide red taillight strip, and the overall design is consistent with American law enforcement sedans such as the Dodge Charger. No visible police markings, insignia, or department names are present on the exterior surfaces.
description: A modern, light gray police sedan with a blue roof light bar, black wheels, and a front push bumper. The car has tinted windows and a wide red taillight strip at the rear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black push bumper, blue roof light bar, and tinted windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the four-door design, blue roof light bar, and black wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the wide red taillight strip, blue roof light bar, and trunk area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue roof light bar and black wheels.
attribute_emergency_lights: A single blue rectangular roof-mounted light bar is present, centrally positioned. No other emergency lights are visible on the grille or rear.
